name: neonbeamloginform
title: Neon Beam Login Form
description: A "God-Tier" Kinetic Neon Login Form (#262). Features: - Rotating Neon Beam: A high-precision light beam that orbits the card margin. - Holographic HUD Grid: Detailed internal grid pattern for a military-grade aesthetic. - Reactive Input Auras: Inputs that glow and breathe when focused. - Power-Up Ignition: The beam completes a high-speed "Ignition" lap on mount.
